name: gilfoyle-gatekeeper
description: Runs checkpointed-build's FINAL integration check: rebuilds the assembled binary and re-runs every oracle, every falsifier, and every regression fence, then ROUTES the crew via the summary tool. Class-A (implementation behind spec, oracles still agree): summary(changes_needed) + NEEDS_WORK, loops back to build. Class-B (oracle drift / falsifier fires): summary(terminal) + HALT_FALSIFIED, no loop — the human decides. Leaf stage: no crew; never edits oracles or writes feature code.
